input: Find all repair orders with complete details including dealer information, customer complaints, parts used, and labor performed
query: SELECT d.delr_name, d.loctn_cd, d.zone_name, d.asm_name, d.ccm_name, h.RO_ID, h.RO_DATE, h.VIN, h.REG_NUMBR, h.ODMTR_REDNG, h.RO_STATS, h.SA_EMPLY_NAME, h.PROMSD_DELVRY_DATE, h.REVSD_PROMSD_DELVRY_DATE, h.PARTS_TOTL_AMNT, h.LABR_TOTL_AMNT, h.DOC_AMNT, h.Warranty_Flag, h.SERVC_TYPE_DESC, h.taxi_indicator, c.demanded_verbatim, c.verbatim_group, c.verbatim_code, c.cust_verbtm_desc, m.MODL_DESC, m.FUEL_TYPE, m.TRANSMISSION, m.SEAT_CAPCTY, m.EMISSION, m.DRIV, l.labr_code, l.labr_desc, l.labr_charg_hrs, l.labr_totl_amnt, l.labour_billable_type_name, p.part_code, p.part_desc, p.part_quantity, p.part_rate, p.part_totl_amnt, p.oem_part_ind, p.hsn, p.product_division_name FROM MH_RO_HDR_DETAILS10 h LEFT JOIN MH_AD_AI_DIMENSION10 d ON h.LOCTN_CD = d.loctn_cd LEFT JOIN MH_CUST_VERBATIM10 c ON h.sv_ro_hdr_sk = c.sv_ro_hdr_sk LEFT JOIN MH_MODEL_MASTER10 m ON h.MODL_CD = m.MODL_CD LEFT JOIN MH_RO_LABOUR10 l ON h.sv_ro_hdr_sk = l.sv_ro_hdr_sk LEFT JOIN MH_RO_PARTS10 p ON h.sv_ro_hdr_sk = p.sv_ro_hdr_sk WHERE h.RO_DATE >= '2023-01-01' ORDER BY h.RO_DATE DESC LIMIT 100;

input: Analyze high-value parts consumption (above ₹10,000) with dealer and vehicle model details
query: SELECT d.delr_name, d.loctn_cd, d.zone, d.rsm_name, d.rccm_name, h.RO_ID, h.RO_DATE, h.VIN, h.REG_NUMBR, h.ODMTR_REDNG, m.MODL_DESC, m.FUEL_TYPE, m.MODL_GROP_DESC, p.part_code, p.part_desc, p.part_quantity, p.part_rate, p.partAmount, p.part_tax, p.part_totl_amnt, p.oem_part_ind, p.abc_ind, p.hml_ind, p.landed_cost, p.purchs_pric, p.selng_pric, p.mrp, p.hsn, p.net_delr_pric, p.gndp, p.ndp, p.product_division_name, p.part_type_name FROM MH_RO_PARTS10 p INNER JOIN MH_RO_HDR_DETAILS10 h ON p.sv_ro_hdr_sk = h.sv_ro_hdr_sk LEFT JOIN MH_AD_AI_DIMENSION10 d ON h.LOCTN_CD = d.loctn_cd LEFT JOIN MH_MODEL_MASTER10 m ON h.MODL_CD = m.MODL_CD WHERE p.part_totl_amnt > 10000 AND h.RO_STATS = 'BIL' ORDER BY p.part_totl_amnt DESC;

input: Get all cancelled repair orders with reasons and customer feedback
query: SELECT d.delr_name, d.loctn_cd, d.zone_name, h.RO_ID, h.RO_DATE, h.RO_CANCL_DATE, h.CANCL_DATE, h.VIN, h.REG_NUMBR, h.SA_EMPLY_NAME, h.RO_REMRKS, h.repair_order_cancel_reason, h.RO_STATS, m.MODL_DESC, c.demanded_verbatim, c.verbatim_group_desc, c.cust_verbtm_desc FROM MH_RO_HDR_DETAILS10 h LEFT JOIN MH_AD_AI_DIMENSION10 d ON h.LOCTN_CD = d.loctn_cd LEFT JOIN MH_MODEL_MASTER10 m ON h.MODL_CD = m.MODL_CD LEFT JOIN MH_CUST_VERBATIM10 c ON h.sv_ro_hdr_sk = c.sv_ro_hdr_sk WHERE h.RO_STATS = 'CAN' AND h.RO_CANCL_DATE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY h.RO_CANCL_DATE DESC;

input: List all vehicles with RSA and Shield registrations including expiry details
query: SELECT h.VIN, h.REG_NUMBR, h.MODL_CD, m.MODL_DESC, m.FUEL_TYPE, m.TRANSMISSION, h.ORGNL_WARNTY_START_DATE, h.ORGNL_WARNTY_EXPRY_DATE, h.ORGNL_WARNTY_EXPRY_KM, h.Warranty_Flag, h.RSA_Registartion_Flag, h.RSA_EXPRY_DATE, h.Shield_Registration_Flag, h.Shield_validity_Flag, h.SCHEME_EXP_DATE, h.VALID_TO, d.delr_name, d.loctn_cd FROM MH_RO_HDR_DETAILS10 h LEFT JOIN MH_MODEL_MASTER10 m ON h.MODL_CD = m.MODL_CD LEFT JOIN MH_AD_AI_DIMENSION10 d ON h.LOCTN_CD = d.loctn_cd WHERE h.RSA_Registartion_Flag = 'RSA Registered' OR h.Shield_Registration_Flag = 'Shield Registered' GROUP BY h.VIN, h.REG_NUMBR ORDER BY h.ORGNL_WARNTY_EXPRY_DATE;

input: Analyze labor productivity by service advisor with hours and revenue
query: SELECT d.delr_name, d.loctn_cd, d.zone_name, h.SA_EMPLY_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT h.RO_ID) as total_ros, SUM(l.labr_charg_hrs) as total_labor_hours, AVG(l.labr_charg_hrs) as avg_hours_per_job, SUM(l.labr_totl_amnt) as total_labor_revenue, AVG(l.labr_totl_amnt) as avg_revenue_per_job, l.labour_type_name, l.labour_group_name, l.labr_code, l.labr_desc FROM MH_RO_LABOUR10 l INNER JOIN MH_RO_HDR_DETAILS10 h ON l.sv_ro_hdr_sk = h.sv_ro_hdr_sk LEFT JOIN MH_AD_AI_DIMENSION10 d ON h.LOCTN_CD = d.loctn_cd WHERE h.RO_STATS = 'BIL' AND h.RO_DATE >= '2023-01-01' GROUP BY d.delr_name, d.loctn_cd, d.zone_name, h.SA_EMPLY_NAME, l.labour_type_name, l.labour_group_name, l.labr_code, l.labr_desc ORDER BY total_labor_revenue DESC;

input: Get all vehicles with engine-related complaints and the parts replaced
query: SELECT h.RO_ID, h.RO_DATE, h.VIN, h.REG_NUMBR, h.ODMTR_REDNG, m.MODL_DESC, m.FUEL_TYPE, m.EMISSION, c.demanded_verbatim, c.verbatim_code, c.cust_verbtm_desc, p.part_code, p.part_desc, p.part_quantity, p.part_totl_amnt, l.labr_desc, l.labr_totl_amnt, d.delr_name, d.asm_name FROM MH_CUST_VERBATIM10 c INNER JOIN MH_RO_HDR_DETAILS10 h ON c.sv_ro_hdr_sk = h.sv_ro_hdr_sk LEFT JOIN MH_MODEL_MASTER10 m ON h.MODL_CD = m.MODL_CD LEFT JOIN MH_RO_PARTS10 p ON h.sv_ro_hdr_sk = p.sv_ro_hdr_sk LEFT JOIN MH_RO_LABOUR10 l ON h.sv_ro_hdr_sk = l.sv_ro_hdr_sk LEFT JOIN MH_AD_AI_DIMENSION10 d ON h.LOCTN_CD = d.loctn_cd WHERE c.verbatim_group = 'ENG' AND h.RO_STATS = 'BIL' ORDER BY h.RO_DATE DESC;

input: Analyze parts profitability with landed cost vs selling price by product division
query: SELECT p.product_division_name, p.part_code, p.part_desc, p.part_quantity, p.landed_cost, p.purchs_pric, p.selng_pric, p.mrp, p.net_delr_pric, p.ndp, p.gndp, p.part_rate, p.partAmount, p.part_totl_amnt, p.part_tax, p.discnt_rate, p.abc_ind, p.hml_ind, p.oem_part_ind, p.hsn, p.part_category_description, h.RO_ID, h.RO_DATE, m.MODL_GROP_DESC FROM MH_RO_PARTS10 p INNER JOIN MH_RO_HDR_DETAILS10 h ON p.sv_ro_hdr_sk = h.sv_ro_hdr_sk LEFT JOIN MH_MODEL_MASTER10 m ON h.MODL_CD = m.MODL_CD WHERE p.landed_cost > 0 AND p.selng_pric > 0 ORDER BY (p.selng_pric - p.landed_cost) DESC;

input: Get all pre-sale/PDI inspections with vehicle details and technician information
query: SELECT h.RO_ID, h.RO_DATE, h.VIN, h.REG_NUMBR, h.ODMTR_REDNG, h.SA_EMPLY_NAME, h.tech_employee_name, h.SERVC_TYPE_DESC, h.SERV_CATGRY_DESC, h.service_group, m.MODL_DESC, m.MODL_GROP_DESC, m.FUEL_TYPE, m.TRANSMISSION, m.COLR_CD, d.delr_name, d.loctn_cd, d.zone_name, l.labr_desc, l.labr_charg_hrs FROM MH_RO_HDR_DETAILS10 h LEFT JOIN MH_MODEL_MASTER10 m ON h.MODL_CD = m.MODL_CD LEFT JOIN MH_AD_AI_DIMENSION10 d ON h.LOCTN_CD = d.loctn_cd LEFT JOIN MH_RO_LABOUR10 l ON h.sv_ro_hdr_sk = l.sv_ro_hdr_sk WHERE h.service_group = 'Pre-Sale/PDI' OR h.SERV_CATGRY_DESC = 'Pre-Sale/PDI' ORDER BY h.RO_DATE DESC;

input: Analyze repeat repairs and revisits by vehicle and dealer
query: SELECT d.delr_name, d.loctn_cd, d.zone_name, h.VIN, h.REG_NUMBR, m.MODL_DESC, COUNT(h.RO_ID) as visit_count, MIN(h.RO_DATE) as first_visit, MAX(h.RO_DATE) as last_visit, h.revist_flag, h.repeat_repair_flag, h.Warranty_Flag, c.verbatim_group, c.verbatim_code, c.cust_verbtm_desc, p.part_code, p.part_desc FROM MH_RO_HDR_DETAILS10 h LEFT JOIN MH_AD_AI_DIMENSION10 d ON h.LOCTN_CD = d.loctn_cd LEFT JOIN MH_MODEL_MASTER10 m ON h.MODL_CD = m.MODL_CD LEFT JOIN MH_CUST_VERBATIM10 c ON h.sv_ro_hdr_sk = c.sv_ro_hdr_sk LEFT JOIN MH_RO_PARTS10 p ON h.sv_ro_hdr_sk = p.sv_ro_hdr_sk WHERE h.revist_flag = 'Y' OR h.repeat_repair_flag IS NOT NULL GROUP BY h.VIN, h.REG_NUMBR, m.MODL_DESC, d.delr_name, d.loctn_cd, d.zone_name, h.revist_flag, h.repeat_repair_flag, h.Warranty_Flag, c.verbatim_group, c.verbatim_code, c.cust_verbtm_desc, p.part_code, p.part_desc HAVING COUNT(h.RO_ID) > 1 ORDER BY visit_count DESC;

input: Get comprehensive dealer performance metrics with service volumes and revenue
query: SELECT d.delr_name, d.delr_cd, d.loctn_cd, d.loctn_name, d.zone, d.zone_name, d.area_name, d.regn_cd, d.asm_name, d.ccm_name, d.rsm_name, d.rccm_name, d.zonal_head_sales, d.zonal_head_cc, d.prodct_divsn, d.delr_type, d.distrbtn_chanl, d.loctn_catgry, d.actv_ind, d.srv_loctn_ind, d.sale_loctn_ind, d.onlin_bookng, COUNT(DISTINCT h.RO_ID) as total_ros, SUM(h.DOC_AMNT) as total_revenue, AVG(h.DOC_AMNT) as avg_revenue_per_ro, SUM(CASE WHEN h.Warranty_Flag = 'Warranty' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as warranty_count, SUM(CASE WHEN h.RO_STATS = 'CAN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cancelled_count, AVG(h.WARRANTY_AGEING_RO) as avg_warranty_ageing FROM MH_AD_AI_DIMENSION10 d LEFT JOIN MH_RO_HDR_DETAILS10 h ON d.loctn_cd = h.LOCTN_CD WHERE d.actv_ind = 'Y' AND h.RO_DATE >= '2023-01-01' GROUP BY d.delr_name, d.delr_cd, d.loctn_cd, d.loctn_name, d.zone, d.zone_name, d.area_name, d.regn_cd, d.asm_name, d.ccm_name, d.rsm_name, d.rccm_name, d.zonal_head_sales, d.zonal_head_cc, d.prodct_divsn, d.delr_type, d.distrbtn_chanl, d.loctn_catgry, d.actv_ind, d.srv_loctn_ind, d.sale_loctn_ind, d.onlin_bookng ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
